headline: 'The results shocked me': A shopper compared 32 items at Walmart and Costco — and one store was nearly 26% cheaper

headline: Assessing Whether Costco Wholesale (COST) Looks Overvalued After Its Recent Share Price Move
summary: Costco Wholesale stock snapshot after recent share price move Costco Wholesale (COST) recently closed at $999.89, drawing attention after a period where the stock shows mixed returns, including a 1 day move of 1.28% and a modest gain over the past month. See our latest analysis for Costco Wholesale. Recent momentum has been steady, with a 17.01% year to date share price return, while longer term performance is reflected in a 105.67% 3 year total shareholder return and 182.93% over 5 years.
